summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cockpit Immo nationwide infrastructure feature. All backend APIs return correct counts (101 HTB postes, 61 DC, 15 submarine cables, 8 landing points). Frontend map displays all infrastructure correctly at zoom 6. Commune search loads parcels with real HTB distances. All features working as expected.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/map/electrical-assets returns 101 HTB postes nationwide
Backend API /api/map/dc returns 61 DC existants nationwide
Backend API /api/france/parcelles/bbox returns parcels with real infrastructure distances (dist_poste_htb_m, dist_landing_point_km)
Backend API /api/france/communes search works for commune name queries (Villepinte)
Backend API /api/france/parcelles/commune/{code_insee} returns scored parcels with real HTB distances
Frontend: Map displays nationwide infrastructure (HTB postes, DC, cables, landing points) on load at zoom 6
Frontend: Status bar shows correct counts (101 postes, 61 DC, 8 LP)
Frontend: Zoom indicator message shows when zoom < 14
Frontend: Commune search loads parcels and they appear in the stats sidebar (8 sites loaded for Villepinte)
Frontend: Layer toggle panel works to show/hide different map layers
Frontend: Stats sidebar updates with GO/CONDITIONNEL/NO_GO counts after parcel loading
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - infrastructure data is served from in-memory france_infra_data.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All nationwide infrastructure features are working. Backend serves 101 HTB postes, 61 DC, 15 submarine cables, 8 landing points from france_infra_data.py. Parcels load dynamically via API Carto IGN when zoom >= 14 or via commune search. Auth bypass uses cookie session_token=test_session_token_2026.
